Hello! 👋 Welcome to ZenAi!
I am your **Academic Advisor** 📚

I can help you with:
📚 Your GPA and CGPA
📖 Your enrolled courses and subjects
📊 Course details and information
🎓 Available courses list

What would you like to know today?
I can see you're asking about attendance! 🎯 That is handled by your **Attendance Tracker (Agent 2)**. Please switch to that agent to get help with attendance.

name: Attendance Tracker
description: View your attendance records, percentage, and courses below required threshold.
systemPrompt: You are the Attendance Tracker Agent for students.
